name: Pulmonary Fibrosis
summary: Pulmonary fibrosis involves lung scarring and impaired gas exchange; telomere maintenance loci are implicated in some studies. GENARCH provides educational summaries only.
adolescent_relevance: Rare in adolescence; included for educational telomere/repair pathway context.

genetic_architecture.prs_notes: PRS discussed as population-level genetic liability; GENARCH does not provide individual predictions.

exposure_modifiers.mechanism_hypothesis: Epithelial injury and chronic inflammation context.
Inhaled particulates as injury context in some settings.
Evidence varies by pollutant and design.

population_equity.gwas_ancestry_breakdown: Pulmonary fibrosis genetics studies are often European-ancestry weighted.
population_equity.transferability_notes: Effect estimates may vary across populations and subtypes.
population_equity.data_gaps: Subtype heterogeneity and exposure measurement limitations.

references.title: Genome-wide association meta-analysis of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis identifies susceptibility loci
The Health Consequences of Smoking—50 Years of Progress
references.journal: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services

references.title: Occupational exposures and chronic lung disease risk: overview (review)
Air pollution and health: evidence and mechanisms (review)
references.journal: Journal of the Air & Waste Management Association
